top_signals.title: Iraq Warns It Might Quit OPEC If It Doesn’t Get Quota Hike
top_signals.summary: Iraq said it might one day consider leaving OPEC unless the group accommodates it with a higher oil production quota, just a few months after the United Arab Emirates quit the group so that it could pump more.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
